storeOs.nodePattern: 7-node (Trigger → Validate → Fetch Themes → Build Plan → IF write → Write Asset → Summary)

safetyModel.allow_theme_writes_required: runtime_config.allow_theme_writes: true must be explicitly set
safetyModel.default_behavior: Returns PHASE_7B3_DRY_RUN with plan — no Shopify writes
safetyModel.theme_targeting: Auto-selects unpublished theme; blocks if only active theme exists; explicit shopify_theme_id overrides
safetyModel.no_template_modifications: Does NOT modify templates/*.json or config/settings_data.json
safetyModel.no_deletes: No existing theme files are deleted
